creator: sem@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello.

Georgi, you have a wrong imagination of FreeBSD team. We're all 
individuals, not full timers. We spend our free time to look at patches 
from around the world, test them and make indecisions if a patch will 
implement or not.

I'll fix something I can reproduce. But I even have no box with 1000+ 
packages to see where it's inhibited.

If you can't programming, you can give an idea how to improve our 
packages system to be faster. I'm ready to hear any your offer.

--
Dixi.
Sem.
